title: Karinne
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Karinne''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] of the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leki]] government.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], ''Karinne'' was [[Defense of the Karinne|dispatched]] with a Twi'leki diplomat to meet with members of Rebel [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]. When [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spies discovered the nature of ''Karinne''{{'s}} mission, the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] was sent to destroy it. In turn, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance Counter Intelligence]] gained word of the Imperial ambush, and hastily scrambled two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] to aid ''Karinne''.

''Karinne'' exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in a deep space location, followed shortly by ''Avenger''. ''Avenger'' launched three flights of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] just as the Rebel Y-wings arrived. As the bombers streaked towards ''Karinne'', ''Avenger'' entered hyperspace. The Y-wings succeeded in destroying the TIE bombers with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] and saving the corvette. ''Karinne'' then departed to meet with Alliance High Command. The Rebel's interception of the Imperial attack earned the gratitude of the Twi'lek delegation who soon agreed to join the Alliance.

The mission became a training scenario for Alliance pilots in the effective use of long range weaponry against bombing raids.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
